series_metadata.series_title: Prison Nursery Program/Infants Born During Confine
series_metadata.series_description: All files pertaining to children born during mother''s incarceration. This could include children who reside with their mother for any period of mother''s incarceration.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 21 years after child''s birth, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 21 years after child''s birth, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
